name: Regulatory and Compliance Frameworks
description: Cross-industry regulatory compliance monitoring — GDPR, NIS2, DORA, CCPA, MiFID II, ISO 27001, NIST CSF, and SOC 2. Deployable SPL for PII detection, breach notification timelines, data subject rights tracking, ICT risk management, and continuous control evidence.
quickTip: Map ES correlation searches and risk scores to specific regulatory articles for auditable, data-driven compliance evidence.

quickStart.title: GDPR PII Detection in Application Log Data
NIS2 Incident Detection and 24-Hour Early Warning Reporting
CCPA Consumer Data Access and Deletion Request Tracking
SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria Continuous Control Monitoring

subcategories.name: AWIA s2013 + EPA/CISA Water Sector Cybersecurity (US)

subcategories.name: CIRCIA + 6 USC 681b (US CISA Cyber Incident Reporting)
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Enterprise Security (Splunkbase 263), Splunk ITSI (Splunkbase 1841), Splunk SOAR (Splunkbase 4413), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Windows (Splunkbase 742), Splunk Add-on for CyberArk (Splunkbase 2891), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Cloud Services (Splunkbase 3110), Splunk Add-on for Amazon Web Services (Splunkbase 1876), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Defender for Endpoint (Splunkbase 6207), Splunk Add-on for ServiceNow (Splunkbase 1928), Splunk Add-on for Palo Alto Networks (Splunkbase 2757), Splunk Add-on for CrowdStrike FDR (Splunkbase 5099), Splunk Add-on for Cisco Cyber Vision (Splunkbase 6071), Splunk Add-on for CISA KEV (Splunkbase 6306), Splunk Common Information Model Add-on (Splunkbase 1621).
subcategories.dataSources: ServiceNow Security Incident Response and CMDB tables (`snow:sir`, `snow:sn_si_incident`, `snow:cmdb_ci`, `snow:risk`); CIRCIA covered-entity register and reporting workflow (KV Store `circia_entity_register_lookup`, `circia_reporting_status_lookup`, `circia_ransom_payment_lookup`); Splunk SOAR playbook telemetry (`soar:audit`, `soar:case`, `soar:playbook`); CISA Cyber Incident Reporting Portal (CIRP) submission receipts ingested via HEC (`hec:circia:submission`); FBI IC3 and Secret Service reporting acknowledgements (HEC); Sector Risk Management Agency (SRMA) coordination correspondence (KV Store `circia_srma_lookup`); Microsoft 365 / Azure AD audit logs (`o365:management`, `azuread:audit`, `azure:activity`); AWS CloudTrail and GuardDuty (`aws:cloudtrail`, `aws:guardduty`); Microsoft Defender for Endpoint (`mscs:wd:atp:detection`, `mscs:wd:atp:advanced_hunting`); CrowdStrike Falcon Data Replicator events (`crowdstrike:falcon:host`, `crowdstrike:falcon:detection`); Palo Alto Networks firewall and Cortex XDR (`pan:traffic`, `pan:threat`, `cortex_xdr:alert`); Cisco Cyber Vision OT events (`cisco:cybervision:event`); CyberArk PAM (`cyberark:session`, `cyberark:audit`); Windows Security Event Logs (`WinEventLog:Security`); CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities Catalog (`ta_cisa_kev:kev`); FinCEN ransomware payment SAR drafts (KV Store `fincen_sar_lookup`); `audit_evidence` index for CIRCIA 72-hour incident report, 24-hour ransom payment report, and supplemental-report retention (10-year statute of limitations).

CAC Cross-Border Data Transfer Security Assessment register (KV Store `cn_cbdt_assessment_lookup`); Cybersecurity Review Office filings for CIIO procurement (KV Store `cn_csrm_filings_lookup`); CAC incident-classification matrix (Level 1-4 — particularly serious / serious / comparable / ordinary, with target reporting clocks); CAC + MPS + sectoral-regulator incident-notification submission receipts (HEC `hec:cac:reporting:submission`, `hec:mps:reporting:submission`, `hec:sectoral:reporting:submission`); foreign-judicial-data-request register with PRC authority approval status (KV Store `cn_blocking_statute_lookup`); Windows Security Event Logs (`WinEventLog:Security`) with ≥180-day rolling retention in PRC region indexes; Microsoft Defender for Endpoint (`mscs:wd:atp:detection`); CyberArk PAM (`cyberark:session`, `cyberark:audit`); Tenable Nessus + Tenable.ot scans (`tenable:nessus`, `tenable:ot`); Palo Alto Networks firewall + Prisma Cloud (`pan:traffic`, `pan:threat`, `prisma:cloud`); cross-border-data-transfer egress logs from CASB / SASE (`casb:dlp:event`, `sase:egress:event`); ServiceNow GRC tables (`snow:risk`, `snow:cmdb_ci`); `audit_evidence` index for MLPS annual assessment, CIIO annual inspection, PIPIA, and CAC incident-reporting retention (statutory ≥3 years for PIPIA records, ≥6 months for operational logs per CSL Art. 21(3), longer for CIIO).

subcategories.name: IEC 61511 + IEC 61508 + ISA-TR84.00.09 Cybersecurity Overlay + IEC 62443-3-2 (Process-Industry Functional Safety)
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Enterprise Security (Splunkbase 263), Splunk ITSI (Splunkbase 1841), Splunk SOAR (Splunkbase 4413), Splunk Add-on for Cisco Cyber Vision (Splunkbase 6071), Splunk Add-on for Claroty (Splunkbase 5018), Splunk Add-on for Nozomi Networks (Splunkbase 4894), Splunk Add-on for Dragos (Splunkbase 5048), Splunk Add-on for Armis (Splunkbase 6019), Splunk_TA_stream (Splunkbase 1809), splunk_app_for_industrial_iot, Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Windows (Splunkbase 742), Splunk Add-on for CyberArk (Splunkbase 2891), Splunk Add-on for Tenable (Splunkbase 4060), Splunk Add-on for ServiceNow (Splunkbase 1928), Splunk Add-on for Palo Alto Networks (Splunkbase 2757), Splunk Common Information Model Add-on (Splunkbase 1621).
subcategories.dataSources: Safety Instrumented Function (SIF) inventory per process unit, with target SIL, proof-test interval, last successful proof-test date, and operating mode (low-demand / high-demand) (KV Store `iec61511_sif_lookup`); Cybersecurity Hazard Analysis (CHA) register per SIF — IEC 61511 Cl.8.2.4 — with threat scenarios, vulnerability identification, target Security Level (SL-T), and residual-risk acceptance (KV Store `iec61511_cha_lookup`); SIS / BPCS zones-and-conduits register per IEC 62443-3-2 (KV Store `iec62443_zones_conduits_lookup`); SIS programming + configuration baseline per logic-solver (Siemens S7-400FH / Honeywell Safety Manager / Emerson DeltaV SIS / Triconex Tricon — KV Store `iec61511_sis_baseline_lookup`); SIS firmware version inventory with vendor advisories (KV Store `iec61511_firmware_lookup`); SIS / BPCS network telemetry from OT detection platforms — Cisco Cyber Vision (`cisco:cybervision:flow`, `cisco:cybervision:event`), Claroty CTD / xDome (`claroty:ctd:event`, `claroty:xdome:alert`), Nozomi Guardian / Vantage (`nozomi:guardian:event`, `nozomi:vantage:alert`), Dragos Platform (`dragos:platform:event`), Armis Centrix (`armis:centrix:detection`); SIS override / bypass / inhibit / force events (sourcetype `sis:override:audit`) with authoriser, scope, expected duration, annunciation receipt, and revocation; SIS proof-test records (sourcetype `sis:proof_test`) with sub-element pass/fail, deviations, and follow-up actions; SIS management-of-change (MoC) register (KV Store `iec61511_moc_lookup`) with cyber-impact flag, regression-test record, and SRS update; functional-safety certification register (TÜV FSE/FSEng, exida CFSE/CFSP) for SIS personnel (KV Store `iec61511_competence_lookup`); CyberArk PAM session recordings for SIS engineering-station access (`cyberark:session`, `cyberark:audit`); Tenable.ot vulnerability findings for SIS / BPCS assets (`tenable:ot`); ServiceNow GRC + CMDB (`snow:cmdb_ci`, `snow:risk`); `audit_evidence` index for SIS-lifecycle audit retention (typically the operational lifetime of the plant plus 5 years for SIS, longer for IEC-61511 hazardous-event records).
